name: Roasted Tomato and Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups White or Brown Rice, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the tomatoes over high flame on a gas range or under a broiler. Turn every 20 seconds to ensure even blistering of the skins.
2. Peel the roasted tomatoes by running them under cold water and rubbing with your fingers.
3. Chop the tomatoes coarsely and toss with warm rice.
4. Mix the dressing ingredients together and toss with the rice and tomatoes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Per serving: 349 calories, 4 g protein, 42 g carbohydrate, 19 g fat, 3 g saturated fat, 7 mg sodium, 4 g fiber, no cholesterol.
